iran_nuke.notes: Day 14 night — FALLING (stable). New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei (reportedly wounded, in hiding) vows to keep blocking Hormuz — conventional posture, not nuclear. Trump $10M bounty on Mojtaba. Nuclear scientists killed + Isfahan stockpile buried continues to degrade capability. No enrichment escalation. No test signals. Holding at 13.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 14 night — RISING/holding in IMMINENT. CNN: 16+ oil tankers/ships attacked since war began. NBC: New Supreme Leader vows to keep blocking Hormuz. Oil prices spiking again. Drone strikes hit Duqm and Salalah in Oman (Wikipedia/Reuters). Trump lifted Russia sanctions to increase oil supply — signals desperation on energy front. IAF continues extensive Tehran strikes. US military says still 'not ready' for Hormuz escort despite Trump rhetoric. Holding at 73.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 14 night — IMMINENT. Guardian: Israel strikes Beirut, orders south Lebanon evacuation — 'most powerful bombardment of southern suburbs yet.' WaPo: 800K displaced, 680+ killed in Lebanon. IDF pummeling capitals of Iran AND Lebanon simultaneously. 210+ Hezbollah missiles fired since Mar 2. Israel killed Hamas official in Beirut strikes. Holding at 78.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL — RISING. Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey (Mar 13). Adana sirens 3:25am near Incirlik. Pattern escalating: 3 intercepts in 10 days (Mar 4, 9, 13). NATO: 'remains vigilant.' Turkey protests to Tehran each time but hasn't invoked Article 4. Iran denies deliberately targeting Turkey. Ankara warning Tehran against further attacks. Atlantic Council: Iran war poses 'greater risks to Ankara than past conflicts.' +2 for escalating intercept pattern. 32→34.

india.notes: India-Canada nuclear cooperation agreement — Pakistan calls it 'ludicrous,' India rejects Pakistan criticism (MEA). India Monitoring Hormuz for shipping impacts. House of Commons briefing: India-Pakistan both expanding nuclear arsenals for deterrent purposes. No escalation signals. Stable deterrent.

russia.notes: Russia told Trump no intelligence sharing with Iran. Trump sanctions waiver benefits Russia. Russia continues arms supply while calling for ceasefire. France authorized US use of French bases (BFMTV). Putin-Trump diplomacy ongoing. Stable deterrent.

china.notes: NOTABLE: Chinese warplane flights near Taiwan PLUNGED from 92 to 7 — analysts puzzled (CNBC/AP). $14B Taiwan arms deal awaiting Trump approval — largest ever proposed, kept under wraps before Trump-Xi summit Mar 31-Apr 2. ISW: PRC increased military budget, escalated rhetoric toward Taiwan in 2026 policy priorities. Flights down but rhetoric/budget up — mixed signals. Stable deterrent.

north_korea.notes: China-DPRK engagement increasing. Kim-Xi correspondence. Iran-DPRK cooperation revival 'highly likely' (SCMP). DPRK condemned US ME attacks. No new missile tests or provocations. Stable elevated.

russia_ukraine.notes: ISW: continued Russian offensive. Ukraine struck Russian electronics plant. Zelensky in France criticizing US sanctions waiver on Russia. Germany's Merz urged Trump to link Iran and Ukraine wars. Russia earned ~€6bn from energy crisis. Stable elevated.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Pakistan bombed Kandahar airport fuel depot (Kam Air). Saudi-Pakistan Strategic Mutual Defence Agreement active — movements between countries. China mediating but strikes continue. Worst bilateral conflict in years. Border fighting at Spin Boldak/Mohmand. Holding at 24.

16+ oil tankers/ships attacked since war began 14 days ago (CNN)
Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey in 10 days — Adana sirens 3:25am near Incirlik (Al Jazeera/Reuters/NYT)
Drone strikes hit Duqm and Salalah in Oman — Hormuz alternatives now also under attack
Israel strikes Beirut, orders south Lebanon evacuation — 'most powerful bombardment yet' (Guardian)
Trump lifts Russia sanctions to increase oil supply — signals energy desperation
China warplane flights near Taiwan PLUNGED from 92 to 7 — analysts puzzled (AP/CNBC)

new: turkey: nato_third_intercept PATTERN ESCALATING — 3 intercepts in 10 days (Mar 4, 9, 13). Adana sirens near Incirlik. +2 for trend.
iran_conventional: drone_strikes_oman — drones struck Duqm and Salalah, Oman — Hormuz alternatives now also under attack
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: NUCLEAR TRACK: still de-escalating — new SL Mojtaba Khamenei focused on conventional warfare (Hormuz blockade vow), not nuclear escalation. Scientists killed, stockpile buried, IAEA denied. CONVENTIONAL: Iran mining Hormuz + ship attacks ongoing, 16+ vessels total. 3rd missile intercept over Turkey in 10 days = dangerous NATO entanglement pattern. Israel devastating Beirut + Tehran simultaneously. Oil supply stranglehold tightening. KEY WATCH: whether Turkey invokes Article 4; whether Oman strikes expand the naval war beyond Hormuz; whether US Navy escort ever materializes.

latest_news.headline: Iran's new supreme leader vows to keep blocking Strait of Hormuz as oil prices spike again
latest_news.text: Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new Supreme Leader (reportedly wounded, in hiding), vows to continue blocking Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices spiking again. Trump offered $10M bounty for info on him.

latest_news.headline: Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey in 10 days
latest_news.text: NATO air defences in eastern Mediterranean shot down third ballistic missile from Iran toward Turkey. Adana sirens 3:25am near Incirlik. Turkey protests to Tehran each time but hasn't invoked Article 4. Iran denies deliberately targeting Turkey. Pattern: 3 intercepts in 10 days.

latest_news.headline: 16+ oil tankers and ships attacked since war began 14 days ago
latest_news.text: CNN tally: at least 16 oil tankers, cargo ships and other vessels attacked in and around Strait of Hormuz, Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman since Feb 28. Iran mining + drone attacks + direct strikes on shipping.

latest_news.headline: Drone strikes hit Duqm and Salalah in Oman
latest_news.text: Several drones struck Duqm and Salalah in Oman, with at least one fuel storage tank damaged in Duqm. Significance: Iran war now hitting countries OUTSIDE the direct conflict zone. Alternative shipping routes to Hormuz also under attack.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Beirut, orders south Lebanon evacuation — most powerful bombardment yet
latest_news.text: Israel pummeled Beirut in most powerful bombardment of southern suburbs yet. Ordered evacuation of south Lebanon. 800,000 displaced in Lebanon, 680+ killed. IDF simultaneously striking capitals of Iran and Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Trump lifts Russia sanctions to increase oil supply — signals energy desperation
latest_news.text: Trump lifted sanctions on Russia to increase global oil supply amid Hormuz crisis. Despite this, oil prices still spiking. Signals desperation on energy front as Iran's blockade tightens.

latest_news.headline: China warplane flights near Taiwan plunged from 92 to 7 — analysts puzzled
latest_news.text: Chinese military flights near Taiwan dropped dramatically from 92 per week to just 7. Analysts puzzled — possibly tied to Trump-Xi summit preparation (Mar 31-Apr 2) or resource diversion to Middle East posture.

latest_news.headline: $14B Taiwan arms deal awaits Trump's approval — largest ever proposed
latest_news.text: Proposed $14B arms package for Taiwan — largest US arms sale ever to the island. Kept under wraps ahead of Trump's planned Beijing trip Mar 31-Apr 2 to meet Xi.

outlook: IMMINENT — Holding at 41% global war probability. Iran conventional (73) and Israel-Lebanon (78) both deep in IMMINENT zone. Three key developments tonight: (1) New Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei doubles down on Hormuz blockade — conventional escalation, NOT nuclear. (2) Third Iranian missile intercepted over Turkey in 10 days — dangerous NATO entanglement pattern escalating. Ankara hasn't invoked Article 4 but pressure building. (3) Oman struck by Iranian drones (Duqm, Salalah) — war now hitting countries outside direct conflict zone, threatening alternative shipping routes. KEY WATCH FOR NEXT 12H: whether Turkey moves toward Article 4 consultation on 4th intercept; whether Oman strikes expand naval war scope; whether US Navy escort ever materializes; whether shipping insurance collapses amid 16+ vessel attacks; whether Israel opens full ground incursion in Lebanon after evacuation orders.
